dashboard.label: CAM — Risk Dashboard
dashboard.description: Quantum risk score and exposure breakdown across code, network and PKI.

search.query: | index=crypto_source sourcetype=cam:crypto_finding earliest=-30d | append [| index=crypto_net sourcetype=cam:tls_connection earliest=-7d] | stats count by risk, sev | eval weight=case(sev="critical" OR risk="critical",100,sev="high" OR risk="high",66,sev="monitor" OR risk="monitor",33,1=1,0) | eventstats sum(count) as total | eval score=round(sum(weight*count)/total,0) | stats first(score) as score

| index=crypto_source sourcetype=cam:crypto_finding earliest=-30d | eval tier=sev | append [| index=crypto_net sourcetype=cam:tls_connection earliest=-7d | eval tier=risk] | stats count by tier | eval tier=upper(substr(tier,1,1)).substr(tier,2)
| index=crypto_source sourcetype=cam:crypto_finding earliest=-24h sev=critical | stats count
| index=crypto_source sourcetype=cam:crypto_finding earliest=-30d | stats count by repo, sev | eventstats sum(count) as total by repo | sort - total | head 20
